title: erysimum hirsutum
intro: Erysimum hirsutum, also known as hairy wallflower or hairy dogtail, is a flowering plant native to the western United States and Canada. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant's health benefits include its ability to reduce swelling and pain, and it has been used to treat various skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The herbal preparations of Erysimum hirsutum include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to promote wound healing and reduce inflammation.
